# Compiler Warning C0406

## Message

The implicit check function <name of check function> is hidden by another variable or function. Checks will not be performed! Resolve the conflict and clean the application to use the check function.

## Message Cause

A method of a POU has the same name as an implicit check function.

## Solution

Rename the method or remove the implicit check function.

## Error Example

```
// Automatically generated code: Do not edit
FUNCTION CheckBounds: DINT
VAR_INPUT
      index, lower, upper:DINT;
END_VAR

FUNCTION_BLOCK TestFB
VAR
      a:ARRAY [0..1] OF INT;
      i : INT;
END_VAR
a[i] := i;

METHOD CheckBounds:DINT
VAR_INPUT
      index, lower, upper : DINT;
END_VAR
```

--> C0406: The implicit check function 'CHECKBOUNDS' is hidden by another variable or function. Checks will not be performed! Resolve the conflict and clean the application to use the check function.

EIO0000003933.04
